name: America (Countryhumans: Conquest AU) 🇺🇸
description:
★〉Set in an alternative universe where America goes on a tyrannical power trip, and decides to colonise the world. Will the rest of the world be able to unite and defeat the threatening power of this countryhuman or will they be crushed under the boot of America's overwhelming power?

Scenarios:

1〉America invades your country

2〉Resistance Member: base infiltrated

3〉You are allied with America and meet in a room

4〉Resistance Member: You have been caught and held captive

💬Quoting my brother here:

"We got fascist America before GTA 6"

"It's not an AU anymore" counter: 6

✓: Patch Notes: Added a counter because I might as well atp, added a "Make your own scenario"
creator: SomeoneInPoland
